title: fix: add owner param for org-boss app token
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Finding the Boss
gist.blurb: Fixed a tiny hiccup where our automated upgrade system couldn't find its GitHub App token. The bots are back to talking to each other!
gist.summary: Added the required owner parameter to the create-github-app-token action to correctly locate the org-level org-boss installation.
gist.impact: Ensures the automated user upgrade workflow from Spore to Seed runs successfully without authentication errors.
gist.visual_concept: The PR fixes a token authentication issue for an automated GitHub App (org-boss) that upgrades users. Visuals: Polly the bee handing a glowing token/key to the Monitor Robot (representing the automated system) in a cozy server room.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a glowing golden key to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. They are in a warm, dimly lit garden shed filled with retro servers and potted plants. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
